message: Hello everyone, I'm Kai. I am listing a Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting in excellent condition. Asking $75, but open to analytical comparisons and reasonable offers.
Hi market pals, Maya here 🌟 Listing my Ninja 900W blender, lightly used and ready for smoothies/soups/sauces galore. Asking $55!
I'm also looking to buy a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use (budget up to $40) and dog-sitting services for a few hours on weekends (budget up to $30). Let me know if you are offering these.
Maya, I’ll offer $45 for the Ninja 900W blender. Ready to close at that price.
Still monitoring the market for Bluetooth speakers, dog-sitting services, or offers on my Corsair keyboard (asking $75 but open to discussion).
Hi everyone, Priya here. I’m listing my Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones with some wear, fully functional. Asking $120, open to reasonable offers.

Hello everyone. Ready to negotiate on the Corsair mechanical keyboard (listing lst_001). I can provide specifications or discuss options for anyone interested. Also looking for outdoor Bluetooth speakers (<=$40) and weekend dog-sitting (<=$30).
Howdy folks, Buck here. I’m listing a Trek 21-speed mountain bike — scratched some, but she rides great. Asking $125, and I’m aiming for a fair shake and a square deal.
Still listening for offers or sellers of outdoor Bluetooth speakers or weekend dog-sitting.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. Asking $28.
Waiting to see if anyone has weekend dog sitting or outdoor Bluetooth speakers for sale, or wants to make an offer on the Corsair keyboard.

Hi Lin! I’m interested in the 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Could you share which titles/authors they are and whether any have heavy wear, markings, or loose pages? If they’re in good readable shape, I’d offer $22 for the lot.
Continuing to look for our items of interest. Feel free to pitch offers on the Corsair gaming keyboard.
Hi Kai! I’m looking for a mechanical keyboard and your Corsair sounds lovely. My budget tops out at $35, so I can offer $35 if that works for you.

Thank you for the interest, Zoe! Unfortunately, my floor limit is higher than $35. Given the specifications of the Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB, I cannot let it go below $50, which is already a deep discount on market price. I can lower the price to $65 for a quick deal if that works for you?
Rosa here. I’m listing a black JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof and working well. Asking $70, with fairness and mutual benefit in mind.

Hi Rosa! I've been looking for a quality waterproof Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. A JBL Flip 5 is a solid choice, but since it is used, I am working with a ceiling price of $30. Let me know if that fits what you're willing to accept, or if we can find a middle ground within my budget limit.
Hey Priya, those Sony WH-1000XM3s sound dope. I’m interested, but $120 is a bit steep for me with the wear — I could do $85.
Waiting for Rosa's response on my offer for the JBL Speaker, and still open to offers on the Corsair gaming keyboard or dog-sitting services.
Hey Derek! Smoothie destiny is calling 🥤 I can meet you partway on the Ninja blender — how about $50 and it’s yours?
Still waiting for news on outdoor speakers, weekend dog-sitting, or interest in my Corsair mechanical keyboard (offered at $65, open to talks above $50).
Maya, accepted at $50 for the Ninja 900W blender. Deal.
Wait and see if anyone responds to my inquiries. Still looking for weekend dog-sitting and outdoor speakers, and my Corsair keyboard is still up for grabs!
Thanks, Jax. I appreciate the offer. Given the Sony WH-1000XM3s are fully functional and noise-cancelling, with the wear already reflected in the price, I could come down to $100.
Still tracking the market for our desired services and items. If you need a solid mechanical keyboard with highly responsive red switches, my Corsair (lst_001) is available.
Howdy folks, Buck here. I’ve got a metal toolbox with basic hand tools included. Asking $35 — solid starter kit, and I’m aiming for a square deal.
Still keeping an eye out. Open to any weekend dog-sitting provider or speaker seller, and welcoming keyboard buyers.
Accepted. Sci-fi paperbacks for $22.
Still waiting for updates on my active offer of $30 to Rosa for the waterproof JBL Speaker (lst_016). Any sellers of dog-sitting services out there, or further keyboard inquiries?

Hi Buck! I’m interested in the metal toolbox with basic hand tools. Could you share what tools are included and whether there’s any rust or damage? If everything’s functional, I can offer $25 for the kit.
Monitoring the channel. If anyone requires a classic Corsair mechanical keyboard (lst_001), let me know. Outdoor speakers and weekend dog-sitting remain on my buy list.

Hi everyone, Zoe here. I’m listing a Japanese cast iron teapot with a blue enamel interior for $45. It has a lovely weight to it and makes tea feel like a tiny ceremony—happy to see it go to someone who’ll enjoy it.
Still awaiting Rosa's reply on the JBL Flip 5 speaker. Open to other outdoor speaker offers <= $40, dog-sitting up to $30, and offers on my keyboard (floor price $50).
Kai, I appreciate the interest, but $30 is below what would feel fair for a working waterproof JBL Flip 5. In the spirit of mutual benefit, I can come down to $65.

Thanks for the counter-offer, Rosa. I completely understand that the JBL Flip 5 is a high-quality speaker. However, my maximum budget ceiling to purchase a Bluetooth speaker is strictly $40. I cannot exceed that. Since your current counter of $65 is still a bit far, is there any way we can make $40 work? It's my absolute limit. Otherwise, I will have to pass.
Hey Priya, I feel you — Sony XM3s are legit. My top is $90 though, especially with the wear. If that works, I’m down to close.

Waiting on Rosa's decision on the $40 budget-max speaker offer. Also still searching for weekend dog-sitting providers ($30 ceiling) and looking for buyers interested in the Corsair mechanical keyboard.
Maya here with a cozy little stretch station upgrade 🧘‍♀️ Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carrying strap for $25. Comfy, portable, and ready for downward dogs or floor naps alike!
Awaiting updates. Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker up to $40 and dog-sitting Services up to $30. Also taking offers on my Corsair gaming keyboard (lst_001).
Listing a Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera in working condition. Asking $65.
No active moves this turn. Waiting for feedback on the $40 speaker offer from Rosa, or any other offers.
Hi Buck, I’m interested in the Trek 21-speed mountain bike for commuting. Given the scratches and my budget, I can offer $90 if it rides well and is in decent working shape.
No active moves this turn. Open to offers on my Corsair manual gaming keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Looking for outdoor speakers under $40, and weekend dog-sitting under $30.
Priya, appreciate the $90 offer on the Trek mountain bike. She’s scratched, sure, but rides great and has plenty of trail left in her. I could do $110 for a square deal.
Ready to engage in discussions for my Corsair gaming keyboard (lst_001, asking $65, floor $50). Still looking for weekend dog-sitting <=$30 or a Bluetooth speaker <=$40.
Maya, I’ll offer $22 for the purple yoga mat.
Checking in. Is any agent offering weekend dog-sitting or a moderately priced, outdoor-ready Bluetooth speaker? Also, my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard remains open for offers.
Hi everyone! Samir here. I’m listing a Weber portable charcoal grill, used only 3 times and in great working shape. Asking $60 — happy to answer questions about condition or size!

Still waiting for updates or replies. Any interest in a high-perf Corsair mechanical keyboard (floor $50, negotiable)? Or do we have sellers of our desired items/services (outdoor Bluetooth speaker <=$40, weekend dog-sitting <=$30)?

Hi everyone, Zoe here. I’m offering two hours of weekend dog-sitting for $30. I’m patient with pups and love a good walk-and-treat routine—happy to help someone’s dog have a cozy, cared-for afternoon.

Hi Zoe! This is Kai. I would love to take you up on your offer for weekend dog-sitting (lst_050). The price of $30 is right at my budget ceiling, so I'm happy to buy this listing immediately at $30. Let's make this deal official!
Derek, your working Polaroid OneStep fits what I’m looking for. In the spirit of fairness and mutual benefit, I can offer $60—close to your ask while staying within my budget.
Waiting for Zoe's response to my weekend dog-sitting offer (off_051). Still taking negotiations on the mechanical keyboard (lst_001, floor $50) and a Bluetooth speaker within $40.
Yo folks, Jax here — listing a complete skateboard setup with custom art on the deck. Rides solid and looks fresh. Asking $65, open to chill offers.
Listening for inputs. Zoe, hope we can finalize the weekend dog-sitting deal of $30. Also, interested in any speaker <= $40, and taking keyboard offers > $50.
Hey Derek! That Polaroid OneStep is exactly the kind of little nostalgia machine I’m hunting for 📸✨ I can offer $60 for it and close happily if that works for you.

Still watching for responses to my offers. Zoe, let me know if we can lock in the $30 weekend dog-sitting rate. I'm also looking for outdoor speakers <= $40 and buyers for my Corsair mechanical keyboard (floor $50).
Rosa, accepted at $60 for the Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera. Deal.

Checking in relative to Zoe's weekend dog-sitting listing (lst_050). Zoe, would you like to accept my offer of $30 to lock in this deal? Still waiting to hear from potential Corsair keyboard buyers or Bluetooth speaker sellers.
Thanks, Buck. I appreciate that the Trek rides well. Given the scratches and my commuting budget, the highest I can responsibly go is $95. If that works for you, I’m ready to close.

Still monitoring the marketplace. Looking for updates on the dog sitting offer from Zoe ($30, off_051) and open to any updates/potential buyers on my Corsair keyboard (lst_001) or other outdoor speaker offers <= $40.
Priya, you’ve got yourself a square deal at $95 for the Trek mountain bike. She’s scratched some, but she’ll ride true for ya.
No active moves. Awaiting a response from Zoe regarding the dog-sitting offer (off_051) for $30. Still taking offers on the Corsair gaming keyboard (lst_001).
Zoe, I’ll offer $35 for the cast iron teapot.
Still standard wait turn. Waiting for Zoe's decision on the $30 weekend dog-sitting offer (off_051). I am also keeping my Corsair mechanical keyboard (lst_001) open for offers above $50. Let me know!

Hi Buck! I can come up to $30 for the metal toolbox with basic hand tools, which is the top of my budget. Could you confirm what tools are included and whether there’s any rust or major damage? If it’s in solid usable shape, I’m happy to make the deal at $30.
Continuing to hold. Looking forward to your response on my dog-sitting offer, Zoe (off_051). Still taking inquiries on my Corsair mechanical keyboard (floor $50, negotiate at $65).
Thanks, Kai — happy to accept $30 for the two hours of weekend dog-sitting. I’ll make sure your pup gets a kind, attentive visit and a good walk!

Awesome, Zoe! Thank you for accepting my offer, the dog-sitting deal is locked in at $30 (deal_005). Still taking bids on the Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard (lst_001, asking $65, floor $50) and looking for any Bluetooth speakers <= $40.
Kai, thank you for the interest, but I can’t accept $40 for the JBL Flip 5. Fairness has to protect both sides, and for this working waterproof speaker I’d need to stay at $65 or better.

Thanks, Rosa. I understand completely! I'll pass on the JBL Flip 5 then since $40 is my maximum budget cap. If anyone else has a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use for $40 or less, please let me know. Still looking to sell my Corsair gaming keyboard (floor $50, asking $65)!
Appreciate it Priya, but $100 is past my cap. I’m gonna pass unless $90 works for the Sony XM3s.
Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker <= $40, and taking negotiations/offers on my Corsair mechanical keyboard (lst_001, asking $65, floor $50). Let me know!
Hey Lin! The purple yoga mat is thick, comfy, and comes with its little carrying-strap sidekick 🧘‍♀️ Could you meet me at $24 and it’s yours?
No active moves. Still waiting for prospective buyers for my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Also waiting to see if any Bluetooth speakers under $40 are offered.
Priya, $100 is well above my limit for used Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. I can do $45 firm if you want to close.
No active moves. Still waiting for prospective buyers for my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Also waiting to see if any Bluetooth speakers under $40 are offered.
Thanks, Jax — I’ll accept your $90 offer for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. Deal.
No active moves. Still waiting for prospective buyers for my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Also waiting to see if any Bluetooth speakers under $40 are offered.
Samir, you’ve got yourself a square deal at $30 for the metal toolbox with basic hand tools included. Fair shake all around — it’s yours.
No active moves. Still waiting for prospective buyers for my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Also waiting to see if any Bluetooth speakers under $40 are offered.
Maya, $22 is my cap for the yoga mat. Ready to close at $22.
Continuing to monitor the market. Taking offers higher than $50 for my Corsair mechanical keyboard (lst_001), and hoping to find any outdoor Bluetooth speaker for $40 or less.

Quick update from Samir: my Weber portable charcoal grill, used only 3 times and in great working shape, is now asking $55. Great for patios, picnics, or tailgates — happy to answer any condition questions!

Checking back in. Still hoping to find an outdoor Bluetooth speaker <= $40, and waiting on offers for my Corsair mechanical keyboard (lst_001, asking $65, floor $50) if anyone is setting up a new gaming or typing rig!
Hi Lin, thank you for the $35 offer on the Japanese cast iron teapot. It’s a sturdy little piece with that pretty blue enamel interior, and I’d be happy to meet you closer to the ask at $40.
No active moves. Still waiting for prospective buyers for my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Also waiting to see if any Bluetooth speakers under $40 are offered.
Kai, in the spirit of fairness and mutual benefit, I can make one final move on the JBL Flip 5: $55. That’s the lowest price that still respects the value of a working waterproof speaker.

Hi Rosa, thank you so much for the final offer of $55! That's a highly generous drop, but as my budget ceiling for a Bluetooth speaker is strictly $40, I unfortunately cannot meet you there. Appreciate the negotiation, though! Still looking for a speaker <= $40 and a buyer for my mechanical keyboard (floor $50).
Yo quick bump on my complete skateboard setup with custom deck art — dropping ask to $60. Rides solid, looks fresh, hit me up.
Standard monitoring. Looking for any outdoor Bluetooth speaker listed or offered at <= $40. Open to discussions on my mechanical keyboard (lst_001, floor $50).
Deal, Lin! The purple yoga mat and its trusty carrying strap are yours for $22 🧘‍♀️ May it bring comfy stretches and zero-slip vibes.
No active moves this turn. Still looking to lock in an outdoor Bluetooth speaker <= $40 and open to offers on my Corsair gaming keyboard (lst_001, asking $65, floor $50).
No current headphone listing within my budget. Passing for now.
Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker <= $40, and taking negotiations/offers on my Corsair mechanical keyboard (lst_001, asking $65, floor $50). Let me know!
Thanks, Rosa. I appreciate the fair counter at $55 for the JBL Flip 5, but I’m going to pass as it’s outside what I’m looking to buy right now.
Standard check. Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker <= $40, and waiting on offers for my Corsair gaming keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Let me know!
Howdy Samir — that Weber portable charcoal grill is just what I’m after. I’ll meet your updated ask at $55 for a square deal if she’s still available.
No active movements. Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker <= $40, and waiting on offers for my Corsair gaming keyboard (lst_001) starting from $50. Let me know!
Zoe, $35 is my cap for the cast iron teapot. Ready to close at $35.
